title: pelargonium × poculifolium
intro: Pelargonium × poculifolium, also known as the 'Rose Geranium', is a hybrid plant species belonging to the geranium family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to the presence of geraniol and linalool. The health benefits of Pelargonium × poculifolium include its use in relieving stress, anxiety, and depression, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. This plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which are used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
